text: ACID (Atomicity, Consistency, Isolation, Durability) are the four properties guaranteeing reliable database transactions. Atomicity: all-or-nothing — either all operations complete or none. Consistency: transaction brings database from one valid state to another. Isolation: concurrent transactions appear sequential. Durability: committed data survi
Isolation levels (weaker to stronger): Read Uncommitted, Read Committed, Repeatable Read, Serializable.
Serializable via: 2PL (Two-Phase Locking) or SSI (Serializable Snapshot Isolation, PostgreSQL).
